summary: Tested Iteration 84 features: HR Attendance Template Download fix (500 error resolved), Announcements & Birthdays APIs, Payroll extraction, Multi-currency (AED/INR) support, and Employee DOB field. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 84 features fully tested. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/hr/attendance/template/download?month=2026-02 returns 200 with xlsx file (500 error fixed). 2) Announcements CRUD APIs working (GET/POST/DELETE /api/announcements). 3) Birthdays API (GET /api/hr/birthdays) returns today and upcoming birthdays. 4) Auto-birthday announcement (POST /api/hr/birthdays/auto-announce) works. 5) Employee personal update (PUT /api/hr/employees/{id}/personal) updates date_of_birth. 6) Multi-currency support (AED/INR) in salary structure working. 7) Announcements page at /sshr/announcements loads correctly with feed and birthday sidebar. 8) Sidebar shows Announcements link in SSHR section.

attendance_template_download.details: GET /api/hr/attendance/template/download?month=2026-02 returns 200 with xlsx file. Previously returned 500 due to NoneType error on salary_structure.

announcements_api.details: GET /api/announcements returns list. POST /api/announcements creates announcement (HR only). DELETE /api/announcements/{id} deletes announcement.

birthdays_api.details: GET /api/hr/birthdays returns {today: [], upcoming: []} with employee birthday data.

auto_birthday_announcement.details: POST /api/hr/birthdays/auto-announce generates birthday announcements for today's birthdays.

employee_personal_update.details: PUT /api/hr/employees/{id}/personal updates date_of_birth and other personal fields.

multi_currency_support.details: Salary structure supports currency field with AED and INR options. Currency selector visible in Employee Details Salary tab.

announcements_page_ui.details: AnnouncementsPage at /sshr/announcements loads correctly. Shows announcements feed, Today's Birthdays sidebar, Upcoming Birthdays sidebar. HR users see New Announcement and Auto Birthday buttons.

employee_dob_field.details: Employee Details Overview tab shows editable Date of Birth field with 'Click to add' prompt.

sidebar_announcements_link.details: Announcements link visible in SSHR section of sidebar navigation.
